item.title: SOFC在人工智能数据中心获得关注，为台湾供应商开辟了三种途径
item.summary: As AI ushers in an era in which computing capacity increasingly translates directly into power demand, energy has become the foundational layer of the "five-layer cake" framework outlined by Nvidia CEO Jensen Huang. While hyperscale cloud providers are accelerating construction of AI data centers, power infrastructure
